jsonLd.title: Biocon is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? Biocon in Kanpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Biocon:
Biocon is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Biocon!
